title: GDPR compliance as a monday developer

posts.author: Pask (Pask)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team is considering adding user concepts to our app and are looking for information on GDPR compliance hooks for developers. Notably the right to be forgotten and the right to request data.

I did not find anything of the sorts in the developer documentation, so I would like to request a new feature that would allow us to be GDPR compliant with our app, which solely stores data in monday.

As a quick suggestion, it could be a form of hooks feature with information as to what the request is (being forgotten, providing user identity information, etc.) and a bulk of items, boards, etc. where the app might have stored data.

If something like this already exists, please let me know.

Thank you
